📻 Radio Management

Radio Stream Settings

📺 YODEBEPRO TV - Video Scheduling

Scheduled Videos

For worldwide playback: upload published_videos.json to the same folder as this HTML on your website. (Local uploads saved in the browser remain device-specific.)

Add New Video

Paste either your full YouTube live embed code above or your Channel ID here. When auto-takeover is enabled, the public TV player will prioritize the YouTube live embed over the scheduled playlist.

Tip: For Facebook Live, use the platform's Embed iframe code for best results. For YouTube, you can use the channel live embed or the channel ID.

📡 11-Channel Live TV Source Manager

Add a live/feed link for each public channel. Supports YouTube embed/watch links, Vimeo, Facebook embed links, Instagram embed links, direct iframe code, HLS/M3U8, MP4, and other embeddable sources.

Uploading will auto-fill the Video URL and publish to the public page.

🎵 Music Library

Your Music Tracks

For worldwide playback: upload published_music.json to the same folder as this HTML on your website. (Local uploads saved in the browser remain device-specific.)

Add Music Track

Uploading will auto-fill the Music URL and publish to the public page.

Support the Ministry

Donations help us continue broadcasting and ministry work.

Donate Now
Admin can also set the donation link for the whole site.
Purchase
Browse products below. Payments open in a secure new tab (you can set your payment link in Admin).
DONATE
Donate securely using PayPal (fastest) or Zelle.
Donate with PayPal
Click the PayPal donate button below. You can choose your donation amount on PayPal.
Scan to donate via ZELLE
Send to: 973-855-2396
Open Zelle Info
Choose an amount (USD) or enter a custom amount. We’ll update the QR text to include your amount as a note.
How to donate:
  1. Open your banking app’s Zelle feature.
  2. Send to 973-855-2396.
  3. Enter the amount you selected (optional note: “CHM Network”).
Note: Some Zelle apps do not auto-fill amount from a QR scan. If it doesn’t auto-fill, just type the amount manually.

Store Admin

This store uses a global catalog file named published_store.json. Everyone worldwide will see the same items when your site is hosted online. After edits, click Export and upload/replace published_store.json on your hosting.

Payment Settings

If an item does not have its own checkout link, the Buy button will use this default link so payments go to your account.

Catalog

Editor

Select an item to edit, or click Add Item.
Tip: For “automatic transactions to your account”, paste your payment link for each item (Stripe Payment Link, PayPal, Shopify, Gumroa
